headline: Textron Extends T 6 Contract As Global Orders Shape Growth Story
summary: Textron (NYSE:TXT) has secured a major modification to its T 6 military aircraft contract with the U.S. Air Force, lifting the contract ceiling to US$510 million and extending services through April 2031. Textron Aviation is adding international orders, including Belgium's first military purchase of five Cessna SkyCouriers, a Beechcraft King 360C order from the Peruvian Army, and fleet expansion in Indonesia. The company is also rolling out new product features, such as an In Flight Operable...
